name: check_availability
description: Checks available appointment slots for a given date. Returns a list of available times based on the client's trading hours, slot duration, and existing calendar bookings. Call this when the caller asks what times are available.

date.description: The date to check availability for. Use ISO format YYYY-MM-DD or natural language like 'next Tuesday'.

service_type.description: The type of service — used to determine slot duration.
